perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a warehouse-style supermarket (Costco) where a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black beret and a dark translucent top, is looking at boxes of pastries on a shelf. (2) She picks up and displays a plastic container of 'French Dessert Set' containing Caneles and Madeleines to the camera. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor kitchen environment where the same woman and a female friend in a patterned bucket hat are sitting at a table. (4) Close-up shots show a knife slicing through a Madeleine, revealing a soft interior, and both women eating and reacting with excited facial expressions. (5) They continue to hold and point at the desserts while talking towards the camera, alternating between full-face shots and close-ups of the food.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic/lo-fi background music starts immediately. A high-pitched, excited female voice begins speaking. (2) A male voice is heard off-camera (the cameraman) asking a question and interacting with the woman in the supermarket. (3) The warehouse ambient noise is faintly audible behind the dialogue. (4) As the scene changes to the kitchen, the BGM continues. The sound of a knife cutting into a crispy pastry surface (SFX) is emphasized. (5) Two distinct female voices and the off-camera male voice engage in a lively conversation about the food's texture and taste.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles throughout the video translating the spoken dialogue. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the start. Pop-up captions like '一顆33元' (33 dollars per piece), '法式點心組' (French snack set), '隱藏吃法' (Hidden way to eat), and '外酥內軟' (Crispy outside, soft inside) appear with colorful borders and emoji accents.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Shopping -> Product Discovery -> Home Tasting -> Detailed Review

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 female passer-by in the background of the supermarket scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a black beret and a dark grey sheer top; the second woman wears a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white tank top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A warehouse supermarket with high industrial shelving (Costco) followed by a modern domestic kitchen with a marble-patterned table and shelving unit in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a lifestyle and food recommendation for a specific pastry set found at Costco, emphasizing its affordability and texture (especially when toasted). It serves as both a shopping guide and an endorsement of the product's quality.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the product, price information, and store logo, coupled with verbal recommendation.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy variety-show style text overlays and informal 'vlog' camera style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses ASMR elements (crispy cutting sound) to enhance the food's appeal for clustering with other gourmet/foodie content.
